summary: Completed testing of NEW notification management page feature. All backend tests (13/13) passed. Frontend tests verified login, navigation, stats display, notification form, role selection, and notification sending/history functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification management page fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: POST /api/notifications/send with target_type='all' and target_type='role' + target_role='teacher|student|admin|employee' all return 200. GET /api/notifications/stats returns registered_devices, total_sent, and devices_by_role breakdown. GET /api/notifications/history returns sent notifications. Frontend page at /manage-notifications displays stats cards, notification form with target selection (الكل/حسب الدور), role chips (المديرين/المعلمين/الطلاب/الموظفين), and notification history. Sending notifications works - success message shows device count and notification appears in history.

tests_performed.notes: Returns 200 with message and device count

tests_performed.test: Backend: POST /api/notifications/send with target_type='role' and target_role='teacher'
Backend: POST /api/notifications/send with target_type='role' and target_role='student'
Backend: POST /api/notifications/send with target_type='role' and target_role='admin'
Backend: POST /api/notifications/send with target_type='role' and target_role='employee'

tests_performed.notes: Returns list of notification records with title, body, target_desc, etc.

tests_performed.test: Backend: Auth required for all notification endpoints
Frontend: Navigate to /manage-notifications page after login
Frontend: Stats cards display (أجهزة مسجلة and إشعارات مرسلة)
tests_performed.notes: Shows 3 registered devices and sent notifications count

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Target selection (الكل and حسب الدور buttons)
Frontend: Role chips appear when 'حسب الدور' selected

tests_performed.notes: Shows 'تم إرسال الإشعار إلى الكل (3 جهاز)'

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Notification appears in history after sending
tests_performed.notes: New notification shows at top of history list

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Stats card updates after sending
tests_performed.notes: إشعارات مرسلة count increased from 5 to 6
